name: ubuntu24.04
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'echo [pgmem] kernel=$(uname -r); if [ -r /proc/sys/kernel/io_uring_disabled ]; then v=$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/io_uring_disabled); echo [pgmem] io_uring_disabled=$v; if [ "$v" != "0" ]; then echo [pgmem][WARN] io_uring is disabled by host kernel policy; fi; fi; if [ -r /proc/sys/kernel/io_uring_group ]; then echo [pgmem] io_uring_group=$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/io_uring_group); fi; echo [pgmem] memlock_ulimit=$(ulimit -l); echo [pgmem] nofile_ulimit=$(ulimit -n); if command -v python-stable >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo [pgmem] python_stable=$(python-stable --version 2>&1); elif command -v python3.11 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo [pgmem] python_stable=$(python3.11 --version 2>&1); else echo [pgmem][WARN] python3.11 not found; fi'
